vocab.meaning: bắt đầu dấn thân vào một sự nghiệp
vocab.example: Having finished my internship, I am now ready to embark on a career in digital marketing.

vocab.meaning: việc theo đuổi học tập/học thuật
vocab.example: Most of my time is currently dedicated to my scholastic pursuits as I prepare for my final dissertation.

vocab.meaning: lĩnh vực hái ra tiền/có lợi nhuận cao
vocab.example: I am working as a software developer, which is quite a lucrative field in today's digital economy.
Instead of a traditional degree, I opted for vocational training to gain hands-on experience in automotive engineering.

vocab.meaning: sự cân bằng giữa công việc và cuộc sống
vocab.example: One of the reasons I love my current job is that it allows for a healthy work-life balance.

vocab.meaning: đạt được một bằng cấp/chứng chỉ
vocab.example: My primary goal this year is to attain a qualification in advanced financial management.
The company I work for places a strong emphasis on continuous professional development for all employees.
As a law student, I have to navigate an incredibly rigorous curriculum every single semester.

vocab.meaning: trụ cột gia đình (người kiếm tiền chính)
vocab.example: Being the sole breadwinner of the family, I take my responsibilities at the firm very seriously.

vocab.meaning: theo học chuyên ngành chính về
vocab.example: I am currently a sophomore at university, where I major in International Relations.
